title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates how to build AI agents using a simple loop pattern with the open-source Strands Agents SDK. The video shows four progressively complex agents: single-tool, multi-tool with model selection, agents with hooks for observability, and a multi-agent orchestrator, all achievable without frameworks or advanced expertise.
